0.0: v.hx = 1.2 * math.clamp(math.abs(ysm.ground_speed2 * ysm.input_vertical), 0, 40) + 0.6 * v.hx - 3 * v.ihx - 10 * v.iihx;
v.hz = 1.2 * math.clamp(math.abs(ysm.ground_speed2 * ysm.input_horizontal), 0, 40) + 0.6 * v.hz - 3 * v.ihz - 10 * v.iihz;
v.hefr = (ctrl.elytra_fly)? v.hefr + 0.3 * math.sqrt(ysm.ground_speed2 * ysm.ground_speed2 + q.vertical_speed * q.vertical_speed) : 0;
